meta.master_invariant: kappa_tot(t + 420k) = kappa_tot(t) for all integer k
meta.law: Every serious motion must verify all 6 conservation laws
meta.illegal_definition: If the transform changed law but did not declare the loss, it is illegal

laws.name: Shell Conservation
laws.description: Total shell occupancy is invariant under rotation. Net shell displacement on closed path = 0.

laws.name: Zoom Conservation
laws.description: Net zoom changes cancel along any closed path. Scale transitions must return.

laws.name: Phase Conservation
laws.description: Net wreath rotation closes modulo 3. Su/Me/Sa current must complete full cycles.

laws.name: Archetype Conservation
laws.description: Net archetype rotation closes modulo 12. The 12-archetype cycle must complete.

laws.name: Face Conservation
laws.description: Net face rotation closes modulo 4. S/F/C/R cycle must complete.

laws.name: Mobius Conservation
laws.description: Parity is conserved; even number of Q<->O flips returns to starting polarity.

round_trip_classes.meaning: Recovered representation is canon-identical on protected fields
Loss occurred but is explicitly carried by ResidualLedger or EvidencePlan
Required law was lost silently or corridor/proof rules were broken
